description_long: This is a modern city bicycle with a yellow frame and a minimalist, geometric design. It features two large wheels with solid, stylized spokes and a black fender over the rear wheel. The handlebars are flat and straight, with a simple stem and grips, and the seat is a standard black saddle mounted on a single seat post. The pedals are rectangular and the crankset is basic, with a single chainring. The frame geometry is a classic diamond shape, and there are no visible baskets or racks attached. The overall appearance is sleek and functional, suitable for urban commuting.
description: A yellow city bicycle with a diamond frame, flat handlebars, and a standard black saddle. It has two large wheels with stylized spokes and a rear fender.
description_view_0: Front view showing the flat handlebars, front wheel, and the narrow profile of the frame.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the yellow diamond frame, black saddle, rear fender, and stylized wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the saddle, rear fender, and the alignment of the wheels.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same diamond frame, crankset, pedals, and the overall structure of the bicycle.
